contentBlocks.original:
नमो देव्यै महादेव्यै शिवायै सततं नमः ।
नमः प्रकृत्यै भद्रायै नियताः प्रणताः स्मताम् ॥ १ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
namō dēvyai mahādēvyai śivāyai satataṃ namaḥ ।
namaḥ prakṛtyai bhadrāyai niyatāḥ praṇatāḥ smatām ॥ 1 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 1: We who are ever disciplined and ever bowed: Salutation to the Goddess, salutation to the Great Goddess, to Śivā (the auspicious) — ever salutation. Salutation to Prakṛti, to the blessed Bhadrā — we are ever bowed and devoted.

contentBlocks.original:
रौद्रायै नमो नित्यायै गौर्यै धात्र्यै नमो नमः ।
ज्योत्स्नायै चेन्दुरूपिण्यै सुखायै सततं नमः ॥ २ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
raudrāyai namō nityāyai gauryai dhātryai namō namaḥ ।
jyōtsnāyai chēndurūpiṇyai sukhāyai satataṃ namaḥ ॥ 2 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 2: Salutation to Raudrī (Rudra's fierce power), to the eternal Nityā, to Gaurī, to Dhātrī (the sustainer) — salutation and salutation. To Jyōtsnā (moonlight), to the moon-formed (Indurūpiṇī), to Sukhā (happiness itself) — ever salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
कल्याण्यै प्रणता वृद्ध्यै सिद्ध्यै कुर्मो नमो नमः ।
नैरृत्यै भूभृतां लक्ष्म्यै शर्वाण्यै ते नमो नमः ॥ ३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kalyāṇyai praṇatā vṛddhyai siddhyai kurmō namō namaḥ ।
nairṛtyai bhūbhṛtāṃ lakṣmyai śarvāṇyai tē namō namaḥ ॥ 3 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 3: We bow, ever bowed — salutation to Kaḷyāṇī (the auspicious), to Vṛddhi (growth and prosperity), to Siddhi (perfection) — salutation and salutation. To Nairṛti (the power of the southwest), to Bhūbhṛtāṃ Lakṣmī (Lakṣmī of the mountains), to Śarvāṇī — to you, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
दुर्गायै दुर्गपारायै सारायै सर्वकारिण्यै ।
ख्यात्यै तथैव कृष्णायै धूम्रायै सततं नमः ॥ ४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
durgāyai durgapārāyai sārāyai sarvakāriṇyai ।
khyātyai tathaiva kṛṣṇāyai dhūmrāyai satataṃ namaḥ ॥ 4 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 4: Ever salutation to Durgā, to Durgapārā (who carries one beyond all difficulty), to Sārā (the essential one), to Sarvakāriṇī (the doer of all things), to Khyāti (renown), and likewise to Kṛṣṇā (the dark one), to Dhūmrā (the smoke-hued) — ever salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
अतिसौम्यातिरौद्रायै नतास्तस्यै नमो नमः ।
नमो जगत्प्रतिष्ठायै देव्यै कृत्यै नमो नमः ॥ ५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
atisaumyātiraudrāyai natāstasyai namō namaḥ ।
namō jagatpratiṣṭhāyai dēvyai kṛtyai namō namaḥ ॥ 5 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 5: We bow — salutation and salutation to her who is supremely gentle and supremely fierce (Atisaumyātiraudrā). Salutation to Jagatpratiṣṭhā (the foundation of the universe), salutation to the Goddess, salutation to Kṛtyā (the purposeful divine power) — salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु विष्णुमायेति शब्दिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ ६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu viṣṇumāyēti śabditā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 6 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 6: The Goddess who in all beings is called Viṣṇumāyā (Viṣṇu's divine power of illusion) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु चेतनेत्यभिधीयते ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ ७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu chētanētyabhidhīyatē ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 7 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 7: The Goddess who in all beings is known as Chētanā (pure consciousness, awareness) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु बुद्धिरूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ ८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu buddhirūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 8 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 8: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Buddhi (intellect, discernment) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु निद्रारूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ ९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu nidrārūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 9 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 9: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Nidrā (sleep) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु क्षुधारूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ १० ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu kṣudhārūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 10 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 10: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Kṣudhā (hunger) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु छायारूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ ११ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu Chāyārūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 11 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 11: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Chāyā (shadow, reflection) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु शक्तिरूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ १२ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu śaktirūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 12 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 12: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Śakti (power, primal energy) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु तृष्णारूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ १३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu tṛṣṇārūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 13 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 13: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Tṛṣṇā (thirst, longing, desire) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु क्षान्तिरूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ १४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu kṣāntirūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 14 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 14: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Kṣānti (patience, forbearance) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु जातिरूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ १५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu jātirūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 15 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 15: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Jāti (species, birth, genus) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु लज्जारूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ १६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu lajjārūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 16 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 16: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Lajjā (modesty, dignity, shame) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु शान्तिरूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ १७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu śāntirūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 17 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 17: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Śānti (peace, tranquility) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु श्रद्धारूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ १८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu śraddhārūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 18 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 18: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Śraddhā (faith, devotional reverence) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु कान्तिरूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ १९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu kāntirūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 19 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 19: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Kānti (radiance, beauty, luster) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु लक्ष्मीरूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ २० ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu lakṣmīrūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 20 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 20: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Lakṣmī (prosperity, fortune, grace) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु वृत्तिरूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ २१ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu vṛttirūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 21 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 21: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Vṛtti (inclination, livelihood, tendency) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु स्मृतिरूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ २२ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu smṛtirūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 22 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 22: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Smṛti (memory, recollection) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु दयारूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ २३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu dayārūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 23 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 23: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Dayā (compassion, mercy) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु तुष्टिरूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ २४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu tuṣṭirūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 24 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 24: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Tuṣṭi (contentment, satisfaction) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु मातृरूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ २५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu mātṛrūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 25 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 25: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Mātā (the Mother) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
या देवी सर्वभूतेषु भ्रान्तिरूपेण संस्थिता ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ २६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yā dēvī sarvabhūtēṣu bhrāntirūpēṇa saṃsthitā ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 26 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 26: The Goddess who in all beings abides in the form of Bhrānti (confusion, delusion, wandering) — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.

contentBlocks.original:
इन्द्रियाणामधिष्ठात्री भूतानां चाखिलेषु या ।
भूतेषु सततं तस्यै व्याप्त्यै देव्यै नमो नमः ॥ २७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
indriyāṇāmadhiṣṭhātrī bhūtānāṃ chākhilēṣu yā ।
bhūtēṣu satataṃ tasyai vyāptyai dēvyai namō namaḥ ॥ 27 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 27: She who presides over all the senses in all beings, who pervades every creature constantly — salutation and salutation to that Goddess of all-pervasion (Vyāptī).

contentBlocks.original:
चितिरूपेण या कृत्स्नमेतद् व्याप्य स्थिता जगत् ।
नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमस्तस्यै नमो नमः ॥ २८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
chitirūpēṇa yā kṛtsnamētad vyāpya sthitā jagat ।
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namō namaḥ ॥ 28 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Verse 28: The Goddess who, in the form of pure Consciousness (Chitrūpā), pervades this entire universe completely — to her, salutation, salutation, salutation and salutation.
